description_long: This house complex features a modern, multi-unit residential design with flat roofs and a mix of brick and white facades. The property is surrounded by a low wall and includes landscaped green spaces, mature trees, and paved walkways. The main structures are arranged in a linear fashion along a street, with driveways and a visible garage. Large windows and multiple entryways are distributed across the buildings, providing ample natural light and accessibility. The landscaping includes a variety of trees and shrubs, enhancing privacy and curb appeal. The overall layout suggests a contemporary urban neighborhood setting with shared and private outdoor areas.
description: A modern, multi-unit house complex with flat roofs, brick and white facades, large windows, and landscaped green spaces along a street.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facades, entryways, garage, and street-facing landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rear garden, fenced yard, and the depth of the property.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear facades, tree line, and private outdoor areas.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the overall layout, roof structure, and distribution of green spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature modern doors, paved steps, and minimal overhangs, with some units having small porches or direct street access.
